name: Banana Split Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Pineapple juice (from the pineapple, heated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except chocolate chips and cherries into the inner pan in the order listed; select white bread and push "Start."
2. Add the chocolate chips and cherries when the Auto Bakery beeps (88 minutes into the cycle), or 33 minutes with DAK Turbo II.
3. Enjoy the delightful banana split bread fresh, chilled, or toasted. It's even more spectacular when spread with cream cheese blended with minced maraschinos and their liquid.
